caption: A man with a beard, wearing a brown vest over a light-colored shirt, speaks into multiple microphones labeled with the "ANI" logo in an outdoor setting with green foliage in the background. Throughout the sequence, he remains centered in the frame, speaking toward the press. The video features various news overlays and banners in Hindi and English. At the top, headlines change from "नीतीश को तेजस्वी की 'सीधी धमकी'" to "2024 में JDU के साथ 'खेला' होगा?". Lower banners transition between "नीतीश कुमार ने 9वीं बार CM पद की शपथ ली," "कांग्रेस चटपटाई, तेजस्वी की 'पिक्चर' बाकी है," and "बिहार के डिप्टी CM बने विजय सिंह." Small portrait photos of political figures, including Nitish Kumar and others, appear in side panels with titles like "मुख्यमंत्री नीतीश कुमार" and "मंत्री." The "NEWS 18 इंडिया" logo is visible in the upper right of the later frames, and a timestamp of "10:02 PM" is consistently displayed at the bottom right.
